name: General Troubleshooting
description: A general-purpose diagnostic flow to identify and resolve common issues across software, hardware, account, and billing categories.

nodes.content: What category best describes your issue?
Please provide your environment details: Operating System, browser (if applicable), and product version.
Please describe the steps to reproduce the issue. Include what you were doing when the problem occurred.
Are there any error messages, codes, or screenshots you can share? Please paste the error text or describe what you see.
Please describe the account issue you're experiencing (e.g., login failure, permissions, profile update).
Please describe the billing issue (e.g., unexpected charge, refund request, subscription change).
Based on the information provided, can the agent resolve this issue?
Here is the suggested resolution based on your issue details. Please try the recommended steps and let us know if the problem persists.
This issue requires specialist attention. We are escalating your case to the appropriate team. You will receive a follow-up within 24 hours.
Your issue has been addressed. If you experience further problems, please don't hesitate to reach out again.
Your case has been escalated to a specialist. A support ticket has been created and you will be contacted within 24 hours.
